`description`."},"revokeAssertion(uint256)":{"notice":"Revoke an assertion. Only the original asserter or the object can revoke."}},"notice":"On-chain trust graph between agent smart accounts. Models relationships using DOLCE+DnS ontology: - Agents are social entities identified by their 4337 account (did:ethr) - Assertions are speech acts: an asserter claims a subject plays a role   relative to an object, within a description (normative context) - Descriptions are typed contexts (OrgMembership, ValidationTrust, etc.) - Roles are the part an agent plays (owner, admin, member, etc.) Trust semantics: - Only the object (or its owner via ERC-1271) can assert relationships - Assertions are time-bounded and revocable - The graph is queryable for delegation policy enforcement","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AgentTrustGraph.sol":"AgentTrustGraph"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"]},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC1271.sol":{"keccak256":"0x66c7ec42c6c43712be2107a50ab4529379bc76a632b425babec698d9da921ac6","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://dce2778f0b638adfc5ba29c2c618c855fe725fa74a16846386aa1d56a834aa04","dweb:/ipfs/QmPV9oWnzQdi58od266j62xvviavLNHqKLZfm6k2K1qy9E"]},"src/AgentTrustGraph.sol":{"keccak256":"0x3dbc3a4710585fbb0208a8aac0cc273d1083ec06bb9d24ca00ea90406adaab75","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cfa201a72b1b3cc4ac7b4712c1cc0cb4b05b1dcb44c9255009f26f15d8d9c780","dweb:/ipfs/QmQLbrUAZ34xhT8U5FCCTKXSZPdv8GwygaARmbJXKJfY3Y"]}},"version":1}

returns._0: True if there is a valid, non-revoked assertion matching the query.

makeAssertion(address,address,bytes32,by.details: Only callable by the object account itself, or by an EOA that is an      owner of the object (verified via ERC-1271 or direct msg.sender check).

params.description: The normative context (use well-known constants or custom)
params.metadata: URI pointing to off-chain claim details (IPFS, https, etc.)
params.role: The role the subject plays (use well-known constants or custom)
params.subject: The agent the assertion is about
params.validFrom: Timestamp when the assertion becomes valid (0 = block.timestamp)
params.validUntil: Timestamp when the assertion expires (0 = indefinite)

getAssertionsByObject(address).notice: Get assertion IDs where the given address is the object.

getAssertionsBySubject(address).notice: Get assertion IDs where the given address is the subject.

getRoles(address,address,bytes32).notice: Get all currently valid roles a subject holds relative to an object         within a given description.

holdsRole(address,address,bytes32,bytes3.notice: Check if a specific relationship currently holds.

makeAssertion(address,address,bytes32,by.notice: Make an assertion: claim that `subject` plays `role` relative to         `object_` within the context of `description`.

revokeAssertion(uint256).notice: Revoke an assertion. Only the original asserter or the object can revoke.
